completion_rule: Source -> Request -> Requirement -> Module -> Artifact -> Test or Waiver -> Evidence -> Runtime State -> Rollback -> Owner Acceptance

phases.objective: Restore all required V16, V17, V18, free-first and security-history checks without weakening truth or rewriting history.

tasks.title: Fix V18 verifier assertion
tasks.next_action: Confirm GitHub Actions pass on current PR head.

tasks.title: Preserve V16 and V17 verifier lineage
tasks.test: Full Stack Architecture V16 and Completion Tranche V17 workflows
tasks.next_action: Confirm both inherited workflows pass.

tasks.title: Resolve full-history security scan false positives
tasks.rollback: Remove only the added commit-specific fingerprints
tasks.next_action: Confirm clean full-history scan on current PR head.

tasks.title: Repair free-first continuity verification
tasks.rollback: Revert compatibility wording if it causes regression
tasks.next_action: Inspect and patch any remaining failing assertion.

tasks.title: Independently verify and merge V18
tasks.test: All required checks green and no unresolved review findings
tasks.evidence: PR check suite, review record and merge commit
tasks.rollback: Revert merge commit or close draft PR
tasks.next_action: Mark ready and merge only after all required checks pass.

exit_criteria: V18 workflow passes
V16 and V17 inherited workflows pass
Free-first CI passes
Security History Scan passes
PR is independently reviewed and mergeable

phases.objective: Account for every known current and historical source, attachment and post-25-June change.

tasks.title: Ingest genuinely newer ChatGPT export
tasks.next_action: Receive a newer export or explicit later-chat source pack, hash it, inventory members and calculate the delta.

tasks.title: Ingest eight supplied shared-chat bodies
tasks.next_action: Receive accessible exports or files containing the eight conversation bodies and attachments.

tasks.title: Recover referenced attachments and historical binaries
tasks.test: Every reference is recovered, duplicate-with-lineage, failed-with-reason or blocked-by-access
tasks.next_action: Build attachment-reference graph from accessible export, repositories and File Library records.

tasks.title: Complete source, thread and chunk coverage ledgers
tasks.test: Coverage verifier passes with disclosed failures and exclusions
tasks.evidence: source manifest, thread ledger, chunk ledger and pending-ingest report
tasks.next_action: Generate after all accessible source extraction is complete.

exit_criteria: Every known source has an explicit state
Every extractable source is extracted or failed with reason
Every attachment reference is resolved or blocked with evidence
Post-25-June delta is calculated

phases.objective: Reconstruct direct project chats into separate canonical requirement and evidence registries.

tasks.title: Classify 83 XRP Tracking New conversations
tasks.next_action: Extract each user request and assistant response after direct bodies are available.

tasks.title: Reconstruct Tax as an isolated legal/tax batch
tasks.next_action: Extract direct chats, then verify current assertions against official Australian sources.

tasks.title: Reconstruct Active Trust as an isolated trust/legal batch
tasks.next_action: Extract direct chats and preserve adviser-review gates.

tasks.title: Reconstruct Finance Planning into AI CFO registries
tasks.next_action: Extract direct project bodies and map to CFO modules.

tasks.title: Reconstruct Financial New and reconcile overlap
tasks.next_action: Extract independently, then semantic-dedupe and cross-link against Finance Planning and Bill CFO.

tasks.title: Reconstruct six Longevity conversations
tasks.next_action: Extract under privacy, evidence-tier, non-diagnostic and clinical/device approval controls.

exit_criteria: Every direct conversation is classified
User requests and assistant responses are separately traceable
True duplicates are consolidated with lineage
Conflicts and supersession are recorded
Each applicable requirement maps to a module and test path

phases.objective: Lock the complete accessible Jarvis specification and its registries without losing source lineage.

tasks.title: Maintain Mammoth Consolidated Framework
tasks.next_action: Update with deltas as direct source batches become available.

tasks.title: Complete requirement, module, agent, skill, tool, model and integration registries
tasks.next_action: Generate canonical registries from reconstructed requirements.

tasks.title: Complete evidence and coverage matrix
tasks.next_action: Link every requirement to source, module, artifact, test, evidence, runtime state and rollback.

tasks.title: Run discrepancy, conflict and no-gaps verification
tasks.next_action: Run only after source denominator and direct project reconciliation are complete.

exit_criteria: All applicable framework sections accounted for
All requirements canonicalized and traceable
All conflicts have DecisionRecords
No-gaps verifier passes or explicit blockers remain

phases.objective: Compare canonical intent against all five repositories, PR lineage, deployment artifacts and live evidence.

tasks.title: Create cross-repository capability and ownership matrix
tasks.next_action: Inventory service roots, capabilities, overlaps, owners, contracts and runtime boundaries.

tasks.title: Create closed-PR lineage and duplicate map
tasks.next_action: Classify merged/closed PRs without deleting history.

tasks.title: Generate specification-to-runtime discrepancy report
tasks.next_action: Compare module contracts to repository and deployment truth.

tasks.title: Implement remaining repository-safe P0 controls
tasks.next_action: Build missing tests, schemas, adapters, observability, rollback and Command Centre surfaces.

exit_criteria: All five repositories have explicit ownership and capability boundaries
Every closed PR is classified by lineage
All repository-safe P0 discrepancies are fixed or waived
No accidental duplicate runtime remains

phases.objective: Prove all required external services and the 18-layer system in authenticated staging.

tasks.title: Dispatch and verify Hub deployment/Gmail workflow

exit_criteria: IAM and secret scopes approved
Smallest real route passes for every service
Persistence, retry, idempotency and reconciliation pass
Backup, restore, rollback and cost ceilings pass
Privacy and security review passes

phases.objective: Promote verified staging through canary into controlled production.
exit_criteria: Canary passes
No unresolved critical security/privacy/cost findings
Rollback is proven
Owner accepts production release

phases.objective: Produce final evidence-backed acceptance, archive and continuity package.

tasks.title: Run final source and requirement accounting
Run final discrepancy and no-gaps verification
Generate evidence manifest, checksums and release notes
Generate rollback, archive, handover and resume pack
Record owner acceptance or explicit waivers

exit_criteria: Every source is accounted for
Every requirement has a complete evidence chain or waiver
All residual risks have owners and review dates
Handover pack is verified and restorable

truth_boundary: This plan executes all repository-safe work and routes every blocked action to an exact gate. It does not claim inaccessible source ingestion, authenticated staging or production completion until evidence exists.
